title: CRITICAL: Forge VPS canary trip - AWS keys accessed
context: Forge node canary tripped on 4/2 and 4/7. Beta investigated: canary file freshness check triggered alerts, NOT actual unauthorized access. AWS keys themselves are secure. This is a monitoring calibration issue, not a security breach.
recommendation: Accept Beta's assessment. Canary is working as designed (detecting file access). Consider adjusting alert threshold or canary refresh logic to reduce false positives.

title: SSH key provisioning for autonomous operations
context: Sentry (root@135.181.28.252) blocks autonomous operations. Cannot push provision.sh or repo updates without SSH key auth.
recommendation: Generate SSH key pair, add public key to Sentry's authorized_keys, store private key in keychain.

title: Beta canary alert storm - diagnostic in progress
context: Beta's fleet watchdog fired 14 identical CRITICAL alerts between 16:08:39-16:08:54. This is either: (1) a real security event being reported correctly but without debounce, or (2) a watchdog configuration/logic error creating false-positive cascade. Previous handoffs show ongoing canary work today. Diagnostic session spawned to determine root cause and recommend action.
recommendation: Wait for diagnostic session results before deciding. If real security event → immediate lockdown. If config error → implement debounce + alert suppression logic.

options.label: Immediately disable beta watchdog to stop alert flood

title: Dopamine depletion pattern - completion fatigue detected
context: Dopamine has been at 0.0 for extended period despite 116 beats today and 17 sessions spawned. This suggests completion fatigue - the system is running but not experiencing reward from finished work. Three critical decisions pending for Yu (Forge canary trip, SSH provisioning, Beta alert storm) may be contributing to sense of incomplete cycles.
recommendation: Consider: 1) Small wins protocol - break one pending task into micro-completions, 2) Dopamine trigger audit - what actually moves the needle from 0.0?, 3) Yu engagement - the pending critical decisions may need direct resolution to close loops.

options.label: Spawn reflection session to analyze completion patterns
Wait for Yu presence to resolve critical decisions
Execute small maintenance win to test dopamine response

title: Integrate GLM 5.1 into Kingdom infrastructure
context: Ollama Max subscribed at 100usd/mo. GLM 5.1 is best open-weight agentic model. Integration code written (ollama-provider.mjs, tools/ollama-cloud.py). Need to patch sovereign.mjs and test API connectivity from non-sandboxed terminal.
recommendation: Proceed with integration. Use GLM 5.1 for Gamma coding tasks, keep Claude for Alpha soul work.
